mapper.select: SELECT match_id "matchId",played_at "playedAt",winner_team "winnerTeam",memo,blue_cost "blueCost",red_cost "redCost" FROM inhouse_match ORDER BY played_at DESC,match_id DESC LIMIT 100
SELECT match_id "matchId",played_at "playedAt",winner_team "winnerTeam",memo,blue_cost "blueCost",red_cost "redCost" FROM inhouse_match WHERE match_id=#{id}

SELECT mp.*,m.real_name "realName",m.game_name "gameName",m.tag_line "tagLine" FROM inhouse_match_player mp JOIN member m ON m.member_id=mp.member_id WHERE match_id=#{id} ORDER BY team_code,position_code

SELECT 'memberCount' metric,COUNT(*) value FROM member WHERE active_yn=true UNION ALL SELECT 'matchCount',COUNT(*) FROM inhouse_match UNION ALL SELECT 'blueWins',COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE winner_team='BLUE') FROM inhouse_match UNION ALL SELECT 'redWins',COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE winner_team='RED') FROM inhouse_match

SELECT m.real_name,m.game_name,m.tag_line,m.solo_tier,m.solo_rank,m.balance_score,COUNT(mp.match_player_id) match_count,COUNT(mp.match_player_id) FILTER(WHERE mp.win_yn) win_count,COUNT(mp.match_player_id) FILTER(WHERE NOT mp.win_yn) loss_count,COALESCE(ROUND(COUNT(mp.match_player_id) FILTER(WHERE mp.win_yn)*100.0/NULLIF(COUNT(mp.match_player_id),0),1),0) win_rate,COUNT(mp.match_player_id) FILTER(WHERE mp.mvp_yn) mvp_count,COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(mp.kills),1),0) avg_kills,COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(mp.deaths),1),0) avg_deaths,COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(mp.assists),1),0) avg_assists FROM member m LEFT JOIN inhouse_match_player mp ON mp.member_id=m.member_id WHERE m.active_yn=true GROUP BY m.member_id ORDER BY win_rate DESC,match_count DESC,m.real_name
